mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id, book_id, book_name, daily_count, total_words, total_days, status, superseded_at, created_at FROM recite_plan WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recite_plan ( student_id, book_id, book_name, daily_count, total_words, total_days, status, superseded_at ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{bookId}, #{bookName}, #{dailyCount}, #{totalWords}, #{totalDays}, #{status}, #{supersededAt} )
